projects.name: AgentPulse
projects.description: A lightweight native dashboard for tracking Codex, Claude Code, and custom AI Agent sessions across macOS and Windows.

projects.name: KfSmart

projects.description: A JVM implementation written in Go, built to explore class loading, class-file parsing, and bytecode execution from first principles.
